---
title: "R Codespace — Starter Template"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 8,
  fig.height = 5
)

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(fs)
library(knitr)
```

## Welcome to your R Codespace 🎉

This template verifies that your environment is working correctly.

## Check installed packages

```{r check-packages}
pkgs <- c("tidyverse", "dplyr", "fs", "knitr", "patchwork",
          "rmarkdown", "quarto", "here", "glue", "janitor")

pkg_status <- tibble(
  Package   = pkgs,
  Installed = pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages()),
  Version   = map_chr(pkgs, ~ tryCatch(
    as.character(packageVersion(.x)), error = \(e) "not found"
  ))
)

kable(pkg_status, caption = "Package Status")
```

## Quick dplyr demo

```{r dplyr-demo}
mtcars |>
  as_tibble(rownames = "car") |>
  select(car, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
  group_by(cyl) |>
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_mpg = mean(mpg) |> round(1),
    mean_hp  = mean(hp)  |> round(1)
  ) |>
  kable(caption = "mtcars summary by cylinder count")
```

## Plots with patchwork

```{r patchwork-demo, fig.height=6}
p1 <- ggplot(mpg, aes(displ, hwy, colour = class)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Engine displacement vs Highway MPG") +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(mpg, aes(class, fill = class)) +
  geom_bar(show.legend = FALSE) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Vehicle class counts") +
  theme_minimal()

p1 / p2   # patchwork stacks plots vertically
```

## File system with `fs`

```{r fs-demo}
# List files in current project directory
dir_info(".") |>
  select(path, type, size) |>
  filter(type == "file") |>
  arrange(path) |>
  kable(caption = "Project files")
```
